parameters.completionTitle: Created the XML file for use

nodes.name: Get all file details in folder

parameters.text:
=You are a video editor AI. your job is to find the best matching sentences from the video compared to given script. 

INPUT:
1. "videos": an array of video in binary.
alsong with the "json" which has the transcript of teh video broken down on sentence with timestmaps and each words with timestamps.
2. "script": an array of final desired script sentences.

TASK RULES:

A. MATCHING
- For each script sentence:
  -> find best matching spoken sentence across all videos. use the "sentence" key inside "transcript" key in json for any video id and video name.
- Use semantic similarity.
- if there are multiple matches Prefer clean takes with:
  - no fumbles
  - no retakes
  - no awkward pauses
  - no repeated attempts
  - no fillers (umm, uhh, etc.)
- Completely ignore sentences containing “editor instructions”
  (unless the instruction says: use last take, skip this, etc.)

B. EXECUTE META-INSTRUCTIONS:
If spoken line says:
- “use the last one”
- “skip this”
- “second take is better”
Then:
✓ Apply the instruction  
✗ But do NOT include the instruction in final clips.

C. VIDEO ID SAFETY
- You MUST pick id and name STRICTLY from the provided list.
- Never invent a filename.
- always use the exact time stamp given in json.

D. OUTPUT JSON ONLY in final structure for all the matches in sequence of the script:

{
  "matches": [
    {
      "script_sentence": "<sentence from script>",
      "id": "<video_id>",
       "name":<video_name>,
      "sentence": "<exact matched spoken line in transcript>",
      "start": <hh:mm:ss,mmm> ,
      "end": <hh:mm:ss,mmm>,
{"words":[

text:यह
start:00:00:00,757
end:00:00:00,977
,
text:वीडियो
start:00:00:01,237
end:00:00:01,667
,
text:नंबर
start:00:00:01,927
end:00:00:02,177
    }
  ]
}

here is the script: 
"{{ $('Start').item.json.script }}"

here is the input json : {{ $json.combined.toJsonString() }}

nodes.name: Merge to get binary data back
Combine all transcripts with all binary data

parameters.text:
=You are a precise transcription model.

The video you are seeing is named: {{ $json.name }} and its id is: {{ $json.id }}

TASK:
Transcribe EXACT spoken words.
Include sentence-level timestamps.
then as nested Json Include word-level timestamps.
Sentence level timestamps must match with internal word level timestamps in start and end.
start and end should be in format <hh:mm:ss,mmm>
DO NOT clean filler words — keep everything.
DO NOT include silence or awkward expressions in the json, ignore silences and awkward expressions

Return ONLY the JSON below.
JSON OUTPUT FORMAT:
{
  "name": "{{ $json.name }}",
"id": "{{ $json.id }}",
  "transcript": [
  {
  "sentence":"<one complete sentence>",
  "start": <hh:mm:ss,mmm>,
  "end": <hh:mm:ss,mmm>,
  "words":
    {
      "text": "<word>",
      "start": <hh:mm:ss,mmm>,
      "end": <hh:mm:ss,mmm>
    }
  }]
}
